affirmations.description: A collection of gentle morning reminders from {siteName}.
affirmations.intro: Gentle, grounded reminders — tied to real situations, to help you start your day feeling a little lighter.
affirmations.noPosts: No affirmations yet. Add Pillar C posts to content/blog.

about.title: About
about.description: The story behind {siteName} and its companion character.
about.heading: About {siteName}
about.charAlt: The companion character of Ổn Mà, Từ Từ
about.p1: is a short animation channel for people who are working, studying, and sometimes feel like everything is a bit too much.
about.p2: The main character isn't a "motivational coach" — more like a friend sitting next to you, saying: "it's okay, take it slow, you'll be fine".
about.p3: Each video covers a small, everyday situation — failure, self-comparison, exhaustion, burnout — with a positive perspective that isn't preachy or clichéd.
about.p4: Follow the channel on TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook & Instagram Reels so you don't miss a new story each week.

shareStory.title: Share your story
shareStory.subtitle: No one knows who you are. Just write.
shareStory.metaDescription: Share a painful story, a sadness, or something weighing on your heart — completely anonymous, no one knows who you are.
shareStory.notice: This is a space to let it out.
shareStory.noticeDetail: Your story is completely anonymous — we don't collect your name, email, or any information about you.
shareStory.placeholder: Tell us something that's been weighing on your heart...
shareStory.successMessage: We read every story. You are not alone.
shareStory.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
shareStory.minLength: Your story needs to be at least 10 characters.
shareStory.footer: Only we will read this. No one else.
